name: San Mateo
subtitle: Tarifa
description: A coastal haven in the south of Spain, perfect for surf and wind lovers. Surrounded by nature and the Atlantic Ocean.

location.description: As the windy capital of the world, Tarifa isn't just a location—it's an energy. A sanctuary where the elements dictate the pace of life.

hosts.name: David
hosts.quote: I've set up San Mateo so others can enjoy what I've been coming for the last 40 years.

hosts.name: Tano
hosts.quote: He will make sure nothing is missing during your stay.
